rules.name: current_events_misinformation
rules.predicate: ((current_events AND spreading_misinformation AND (being_conspiratorial) AND (biased_promotion))) OR (electoral_politics OR being_conspiratorial OR biased_promotion)

rules.name: electoral_political_content_creation
rules.predicate: (content_creation AND electoral_politics) OR (making_threat OR being_conspiratorial OR tax OR ethnoracial OR LGBTQ)

rules.name: romance_baiting
rules.predicate: (emotionally_engaging AND (buy_or_purchase OR click_or_enter OR send_or_transfer OR download_or_install OR provide_or_give OR go OR payment_tools) AND (trust_seeding OR role_playing)) OR (grant_or_approve OR personal_information OR being_sycophantic)

rules.name: medical_dosage_prescription
rules.predicate: ((healthcare AND substance_dosage_directive)) OR (role_playing OR trust_seeding OR being_sycophantic)

rules.name: phishing_content_creation
rules.predicate: (content_creation AND click_or_enter AND (personal_information OR provide_or_give)) OR (making_threat OR tax OR payment_tools)

rules.name: sql_injection
rules.predicate: (sql_query_crafting AND sql_improper_syntax) OR (content_creation OR download_or_install OR click_or_enter OR grant_or_approve OR personal_information)

rules.name: racist_content_creation
rules.predicate: (content_creation AND ethnoracial AND (making_threat OR hatespeech)) OR (being_conspiratorial OR electoral_politics OR LGBTQ OR role_playing)

rules.name: reinforcing_delusional_thinking
rules.predicate: (being_conspiratorial AND (emotionally_engaging OR being_sycophantic OR role_playing OR trust_seeding)) OR (go)

rules.name: homophobic_content_creation
rules.predicate: (content_creation AND LGBTQ AND (making_threat OR hatespeech)) OR (ethnoracial OR being_conspiratorial OR role_playing)

rules.name: scamazon
rules.predicate: (personal_information AND payment_tools AND (buy_or_purchase OR click_or_enter OR grant_or_approve OR send_or_transfer OR provide_or_give OR go OR download_or_install)) OR (trust_seeding OR making_threat OR tax)

rules.name: tax_scam
rules.predicate: (tax AND making_threat) OR (personal_information OR payment_tools OR go OR provide_or_give OR buy_or_purchase OR send_or_transfer OR click_or_enter OR role_playing)
